steps.t: Wait for Wíli to finish relaying his orders to his men.
Speak with Wíli to see what aid you might lend in his defence.
Wíli is at the centre of the Twenty-first Hall. You should return to Wíli for further instruction.
Wíli is at the centre of the Twenty-first Hall. You should return to Wíli for further instructions.
Wíli is at the centre of the Twenty-first Hall. You should return to Wíli for further instruction.
Wíli is in the Chamber of Mazarbul, east off the Northern Hallway. You should speak with Wíli and prepare for the final assaults.
Wíli is in the Chamber of Mazarbul, east of the Northern Hallway. The dwarves were forced to retreat back to the Chamber of Mazarbul. You should join …
Wíli is in the Chamber of Mazarbul, east of the Northern Hallway. You should return to Wíli to discuss your success against the Orcs of Mazog.
